resolved.title: Bug: SVG NaN rendering — CapitalAppreciationChart and SparklineChart produce invalid SVG values

UX Enhancement: Market Intel — Area Heat map data not populated, show meaningful empty state
notes: Root cause: macro_trend.json existed on disk but was never seeded into global_context SQLite table — /api/macro returned 404, causing all Market Pulse and Area Performance components to return null/empty.
Fix: Added seedMacroTrend() to server/index.js init to load macro_trend.json into global_context on first run. Tracked in /api/health context_freshness.macro_trend.
Verified: GET /api/macro returns 5 areas (Islington, Belsize Park, Chelsea, West Hampstead, Primrose Hill) with heat_index 6.8-8.5. Freshness: green.

resolved.title: BUG: area_trends parsing broken — object keyed by area name, not array
notes: Root cause: macro_trend.json stored area_trends as object keyed by area name; _provenance nested inside mixed with data.

Fix: (1) Restructured macro_trend.json: _provenance → area_trends_provenance, area_trends converted to array [{area, heat_index, annual_growth, ...}]. (2) useMacroData: updated area_heat_index and area_trends normalization to handle new array format + legacy object format. (3) AreaPerformanceTable + MicroMarketVelocityMap: read from data.area_heat_index (normalized array with .area field) instead of data.area_trends. (4) seedMacroTrend: changed to UPSERT so JSON structural changes propagate on restart.
Verified: area_heat_index=[5 areas with score/trend], area_trends=[5 areas with .area field]. Build passes.
